diagrams.title: Quadratic Form Classification Tree
diagrams.description: Decision tree for classifying quadratic forms based on eigenvalues and principal minors
elements: Principal minors alternative: All leading principal minors > 0 → PD
diagrams.purpose: Visual classification guide for quick determination of quadratic form type

diagrams.title: Eigenvalue Spectrum for Each Type
diagrams.description: Shows eigenvalue distribution for different definiteness classes
diagrams.purpose: Understand relationship between eigenvalues and definiteness classification

diagrams.title: 3D Surface Visualization of Quadratic Forms
diagrams.description: Shows geometric interpretation of different quadratic forms in 3D
elements: z = x² : Parabolic cylinder (PSD in some directions)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize what each type of quadratic form looks like geometrically
